## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build Kroira.sln -c Debug -p:Platform=x64`
- [ ] Regression suite run when behavior or pipeline logic changed
- [ ] Store/release docs checked when public copy, metadata, privacy, support, screenshots, or packaging changed
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR stays aligned with the current V2 release-candidate product baseline
- [ ] I did not reintroduce abandoned UI or architecture experiments
- [ ] I did not include provider credentials, playlist URLs, or other sensitive data
- [ ] I did not imply that KROIRA provides channels, playlists, subscriptions, credentials, or media content
- [ ] If I changed visible UI behavior, I added sanitized screenshots or explained why they are not needed

## Notes

Include follow-up work, tradeoffs, or review context if needed.
